cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Selected top candidates from the shortlist with highest scores, prioritizing digits frequent in historical data per position. Top5 are the highest scoring and align well with frequent digits in positions 1 (4,3,8), 2 (6,3,5), 3 (3,9,1), 4 (4,1,0), 5 (9,2,6), 6 (1,0,7), and 7 (9,3,4). The top50 extends this selection while maintaining score ranking and digit frequency consistency.
